name: Quarto
author: Blaise Müller (1991), Gigamic / AGP
description: Quarto (Blaise Müller, Gigamic). 16 unique pieces, each a combination of four binary attributes (tall/short, light/dark, round/square, hollow/solid). Pieces are shared: on your turn you PLACE the piece your opponent handed you, then CHOOSE one of the remaining pieces for them. The first move is just choosing a piece for the second player. You win if, after your placement, any full row, column, or main diagonal of four pieces all share at least one attribute. A full board with no such line is a draw. An advanced option also wins on any full 2x2 square.
